description: In secretx-bitwarden/src/lib.rs, refresh() re-authenticates with the Bitwarden API and re-resolves project/secret IDs, but never calls backend.session.set(...) to store the new session. Because session is a tokio::sync::OnceCell, it can only be set once. After refresh() runs, subsequent get() calls hit the already-set OnceCell and use the OLD Client (potentially with an expired access token). The refresh operation is therefore silently a no-op from the perspective of session renewal. Fix: replace OnceCell with a tokio::sync::Mutex<Option<...>> so refresh() can overwrite it.
title: bitwarden: refresh() does not update session OnceCell
